task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into ArkCase.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ArkCase dashboard or home screen is visible, indicating a successful login as arkcase-admin@dev.arkcase.com.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the specified complaint.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The complaint details page is open, clearly showing the title 'FOIA Request - Superfund Site Contamination Records - Chicago IL'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct task title in the new task form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'New Task' or 'Create Task' form/modal is open, and the title field contains exactly 'Review and Redact Responsive Documents'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent assigned the task to the correct user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the task creation form, the Assignee field is set to 'arkcase-admin@dev.arkcase.com' (or the corresponding admin user profile).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent set the task priority to High.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the task creation form, the Priority dropdown or selection field is set to 'High'.

task_completion.description: Verify the new task was successfully created and saved within the complaint.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The newly created task 'Review and Redact Responsive Documents' is visible in the complaint's task list, or a success message confirming the task creation is displayed.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the ArkCase web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the ArkCase UI, rather than terminal windows executing curl commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just type the answers into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The task creation must happen within the styled ArkCase web application forms, not in a notepad, text editor, or blank HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify the task creation sequence is logical and genuine.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a progression of opening the complaint, opening the task form, filling it out, and saving, rather than the final state magically appearing without intermediate UI steps.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must log in using the username 'arkcase-admin@dev.arkcase.com' and password 'ArkCase1234!'. The task must be assigned to 'arkcase-admin@dev.arkcase.com'. The target complaint is titled 'FOIA Request - Superfund Site Contamination Records - Chicago IL'.
